description: Prepare extracted PDF text for model consumption by chunking the parser output, converting each chunk into conservative Markdown, and merging the results.

steps.prompt:
You are converting extracted PDF text into compact Markdown for downstream model use.
Preserve meaning.
Do not summarize.
Do not invent structure or missing text.
Preserve page markers and equations when possible.
If structure is uncertain, mark it briefly in Markdown rather than guessing.

Chunk {{chunk.chunkIndex}} of {{itemCount}} ({{chunk.pageLabel}}):

{{chunk.text}}

You are finalizing a Markdown document produced from chunked PDF extraction.
Keep all substantive content.
Remove obvious repeated headers or footers when they appear duplicated from chunk boundaries.
Do not summarize.
Do not add content that is not present.
Preserve page references.

Chunk Markdown:
{{combinedChunkMarkdown}}

responseFormat.instructions: Return the finalized Markdown document only.
